steps.title: Identify the sequential structure
steps.content: The sentence begins with “first consider” and uses a semicolon to join a second clause. The word “first” signals a multi-step procedure, so the transition after the semicolon must show what step comes next in that sequence.

steps.title: Match the transition to the sequence
steps.content: “Next” marks the second step in the procedure—you first consider one painting, then move to the next action of comparing it with another. The other options don't fit this sequential logic. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
